content.problemStatement:
You are given two integers N (N≥2)N \ ( N \geq 2)N (N≥2) and SSS. You have to construct an array AAA containing NNN integers such that:


0≤Ai≤S0 \leq A_i \leq S0≤Ai​≤S for each 1≤i≤N1 \leq i \leq N1≤i≤N
A1+A2+…+AN=SA_1 + A_2 + \ldots + A_N = SA1​+A2​+…+AN​=S
A1&A2&…&AN=0A_1 \mathbin{\&} A_2 \mathbin{\&} \ldots \mathbin{\&} A_N = 0A1​&A2​&…&AN​=0, where &\mathbin{\&}& denotes bitwise AND operator.
The maximum element of the array is minimized.
Find the maximum element of the array AAA.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and SSS — the length of array and sum of array elements respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the maximum element of the array AAA.
